concerns.text: Potential ambiguity: FR-005 aggregates centrality values *per network* (DMN and FPN) producing a mean per network, while FR-007 and SC-003 describe regression over 9 tests (3 centrality metrics × 3 cognitive domains) without mentioning the network dimension. It is unclear whether the regression uses per‑network means, per‑ROI values, or a combined metric, leading to a possible scope shift.
